title: 宝塚記念の後に・リベンジ達成！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Phantom Bird is flying high! And what a
miraculous flight it is! She overtakes Silence
Suzuka, and...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oleeeee!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fatigue won't bring her down today! Our proud
and joyful champion is posing triumphantly in
front of all of her adoring fans!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I... I did it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You and Grass have been supporting me ever
since the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And now I've finally made it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even if it was just one race, I was able to beat
Suzuka, the Mach Speed Warrior!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No one calls me that...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka! Sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's fine. Congratulations on your win.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I think you understand now. You have a unique
strength.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You can convert the support of others into your
own power.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, see you around.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The support of others... Qué?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass... El! Suzuka! She... El... Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Take a breath...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El won! She beat Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's right. She's surpassed Suzuka, and in doing
so, she's become the face of our generation...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean we'll go down without a
fight.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
All it means is that we don't need to watch over El
anymore. That's all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, everyone here at Hanshin Racecourse!
Recall, remember—and rejoice! Tell me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Who's today's winner?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And this victory is only one stage of my journey!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka has taken me to higher heights, but this
condor's aimin' to be the world's strongest racer!
So where will my wings take me next, you ask?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You guessed it! The stage I abandoned long ago!
The gathering of the world's best runners—the
Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And who's the Umamusume that's going to be
champion?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thaaat's right!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Sorry to keep you waiting! My
preparations are finally complete!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This time, we're definitely going! To the Japan
Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
More than a year later, El Condor Pasa is finally
back on track.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But still... there are some things I don't really
understand.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka told me that I convert my fans' cheers into
power.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But that must be the same for all Umamusume.
Even if Suzuka is different, it must be the same
for Spe and others.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Why does she think it's only me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite understand it myself. But whatever it
is, that's clearly what led to El Condor Pasa's
victory today.
